use_cases: Displaying book or publication content with immersive 3D perspective effect
Showcasing products in an interactive catalog with depth perception
Creating engaging educational materials that feel tangible
Building portfolio or media galleries with interactive hover reveals
Designing e-commerce product pages with premium 3D book presentation
ai_summary: A 3D perspective book component with CSS transforms and hover interactions that rotate and scale the book element. Supports multiple sizes and dark mode with textured option. Features realistic shadows, rounded corners, and a gradient spine for depth. Ideal for displaying books, publications, or products in an immersive visual format with interactive hover states.
